command: echo '=== Finding repo on VPS ===' && find /opt/claude-code/workspace /opt/claude-code /home -maxdepth 3 -name 'agentic-rag' -type d 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Checking git repos ===' && ls /opt/claude-code/workspace/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'workspace empty or missing' && echo '=== Deploy vector server ===' && mkdir -p /opt/claude-code/workspace && cd /opt/claude-code/workspace && if [ -d agentic-rag ]; then cd agentic-rag && git fetch origin claude/check-supabase-pgvector-WLQiZ && git checkout claude/check-supabase-pgvector-WLQiZ && git pull origin claude/check-supabase-pgvector-WLQiZ; else git clone --branch claude/check-supabase-pgvector-WLQiZ --single-branch https://github.com/pavelluka0605-stack/agentic-rag.git && cd agentic-rag; fi && echo '=== Install vector server deps ===' && cd .claude/mcp/vector-server && npm install --production && echo '=== Verify ===' && ls -la node_modules/.package-lock.json && node -e "console.log('Node OK, version:', process.version)" && echo 'DONE'
intent: deploy vector server code to VPS and install deps
